ServiceUrl.Name: Service URL
ServiceUrl.Hint: Base URL of the Zenith Adventure web service.

AuthToken.Name: Auth Token
AuthToken.Hint: Personal access token from your Zenith account.

AutoLinkPlaylists.Name: Auto-link playlists to scenes
AutoLinkPlaylists.Hint: When enabled, scenes with a playlist hint set their playlistSound automatically.

VerboseLogging.Name: Verbose logging
VerboseLogging.Hint: Log every pipeline step to the browser console.

Errors.GMOnly: Only the GM can import adventure bundles.
Errors.AlreadyImported: This bundle has already been imported. Undo it first if you want to re-import.
